steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: Fictional yet realistic, is an introductory adjective phrase. The blank must contain an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the introductory modifier rule
steps.content:
Rule: an introductory adjective phrase must modify the grammatical subject of the clause that immediately follows the comma. The passage defines personas as brief profiles of imaginary characters — the personas themselves are fictional yet realistic, not the designers or the users.

A: "Fictional yet realistic, these personas include specific details..." — personas is the subject; personas are fictional yet realistic. Modifier correctly attached. Correct.

B: "Fictional yet realistic, specific details that UX designers draw from actual users are included..." — specific details cannot be fictional yet realistic in this context. Dangling modifier.

C: "Fictional yet realistic, UX designers include specific details..." — UX designers are not fictional and realistic characters. Dangling modifier.

D: "Fictional yet realistic, actual users are the source..." — actual users are real, not fictional. Dangling modifier.
